creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm inclined to say that if bsdinstall permits you to select a boot mode that leads to the installation failing, then that is a bug.  We can make this bug report about that if you like.

I'm also wondering why /boot/pmbr is not shipped.  It's just a 512 byte file, but very useful for preparing disks for x86 systems.
